category_sources: source_facts.description says helper to run CNCF's k3s in Docker; official docs describe k3d as a wrapper to run k3s in Docker.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is k3d; official docs and GitHub repository use k3d.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to k3d.io as website with documentation; official k3d documentation says the website contains all k3d documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/k3d-io/k3d, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names k3s and Docker; source_facts.executables lists k3d; official README topics include go, docker, kubernetes, cluster, rancher, k3s, k3d.
